title: FFmpegConverter.convert_batch kwarg drift breaks orchestrator call
description: BaseConverter / MagickConverter / SharpConverter expose convert_batch(..., suffix='', dimensions=None). FFmpegConverter.convert_batch (app/core/converters/ffmpeg_converter.py:174) instead exposes filename_suffix='' and has no dimensions param. Orchestrator (orchestrator.py:251-259) calls converter.convert_batch(..., suffix=suffix, dimensions=dim_cache), so the ffmpeg cell always raises TypeError. Fix: rename the FFmpegConverter override to suffix=, plumb through to _run_image2_path/_run_multimap_path/_fallback_per_file (which internally already use filename_suffix= consistently), and accept (but ignore) dimensions for interface parity. Bonus: enable a mypy/pyright check on BaseConverter so this LSP violation cannot recur.
close_reason: Fixed: orchestrator now imports PROJ_ROOT; FFmpegConverter.convert_batch renamed filename_suffix->suffix and now accepts dimensions= for interface parity. All 20 hardening tests pass; BatchOrchestrator constructs.

title: orchestrator.py uses undefined PROJ_ROOT in __init__
description: BatchOrchestrator.__init__ at app/batch_api/orchestrator.py:87,90,93 references PROJ_ROOT but the import (line 29) only pulls APP_ROOT from ..core.paths. Construction raises NameError, so the API and every test that builds a BatchOrchestrator is dead on arrival. Fix: add PROJ_ROOT to the existing 'from ..core.config import (...)' block or replace with 'from ..core.paths import APP_ROOT, PROJ_ROOT'.
close_reason: Fixed: orchestrator now imports PROJ_ROOT; FFmpegConverter.convert_batch renamed filename_suffix->suffix and now accepts dimensions= for interface parity. All 20 hardening tests pass; BatchOrchestrator constructs.

close_reason: scripts/manifest.ps1 (create/verify, exit 0/1/2), scripts/smoke_test.ps1 (real BatchRequest shape, polls status, multi-tool), scripts/build_bundle.ps1 (preflight + staged copy + manifest).

title: T1+T2: Pin Py 3.14 + air_gap_deps-driven wheel download
description: Set pyproject.toml requires-python to >=3.14 and rewrite scripts/download_wheels.ps1 to read scripts/air_gap_deps.txt with --python-version 3.14 --platform win_amd64 --abi cp314 --only-binary=:all:
close_reason: pyproject pinned to >=3.14; air_gap_deps.txt now includes dev extras; download_wheels.ps1 reads it and pins cp314/win_amd64/binary-only with loud failure on missing wheels.

title: Air-gapped production preparation: docs + scripts
description: Inspect codebase, document air-gap deployment gaps, write dev_plan.md (prep steps + scripts) and air_gapped_guide.md (dev-facing how-to). Surfaced gaps: (1) cp314 wheel vs 3.12 Dockerfile drift, (2) download_wheels.ps1 hardcoded list duplicating scripts/air_gap_deps.txt, (3) no SHA256 manifest for bundle, (4) Dockerfile does apt-get/curl/npm install over network, (5) dev extras (pytest/respx/wand) not in wheels mirror, (6) no offline npm mirror for Docker variant.
close_reason: All sub-tasks executed in scope: T1+T2 (rgn), T4 (ghr), T5 (bv2), T8 (bzy), T9 (ymi), bundle assembler (50s). Docker (T3/T6) deferred per user direction. Manifest round-trip verified clean-and-tamper. End-to-end smoke (download->build->extract->launch->smoke) still recommended before declaring production-ready — documented as open item in dev_plan §4.

title: Remove ffmpeg_nvenc and all GPU support (CPU-only deployment)
description: Target deployment server has no GPU. Rip out: FFmpegNvencConverter, Tool.ffmpeg_nvenc enum value, NVENC orchestrator wiring, gpu_utils module, GPU telemetry sampling, gpu_peak_pct/vram_peak_mb DB columns, use_gpu kwargs on converter convert() signatures, GUI nvenc toggles, all nvenc tests, and update README/ARCHITECTURE/CHANGELOG/CONTRIBUTING. Triggered by 2026-05-29 matrix E2E showing 488/500 NVENC session-cap failures and 0.0 gpu_peak_pct across all tools (telemetry never sampled NVML).

title: E2E matrix test on image_samples (5 tools -> AVIF)
description: Run test_matrix.py against F:\DEV\pixelpivot_batch\image_samples to verify post-merge converter matrix end-to-end. Covers magick/vips/sharp/ffmpeg/ffmpeg_nvenc -> AVIF, persists per-tool batch_runs rows for inspection.

title: OSS-readiness pass: README + LICENSE + docstrings + meta
description: One-shot prep so the snapshot commit baselines a project that's actually consumable as open source. Scope: rewrite README.md (the current one references a non-existent parent dir), add Apache-2.0 LICENSE, enrich pyproject.toml (license/authors/URLs/classifiers), add CONTRIBUTING.md + CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md (Contributor Covenant 2.1) + CHANGELOG.md skeleton, dispatch haiku subagents to add module/class/function docstrings across app/ + tools/ + scripts/. Lands as the initial baseline commit on main.
close_reason: Landed in da50577 (initial import + Apache-2.0 OSS prep)

title: ffmpeg image2 batch path is gated off for AVIF/JXL (regressed merge feature)
description: merge_sum.md headlines 'Hybrid FFmpeg Batching: image2 + multimap', but ffmpeg_converter.py:244 sets can_use_image2 = target_format not in ('avif', 'jxl'). So the image2 path only ever runs for WebP, and the AVIF/JXL matrix never touches the staging+hardlink fast path. Decide: either restore image2 for AVIF/JXL behind a feature flag, OR update merge_sum.md and CLAUDE.md (which still claims '~4.9x uniform-size batches') to reflect the WebP-only reality.
close_reason: Resolved with feature flag IMAGE2_ALLOW_LOSSY_FORMATS in config.py (env: PIXELPIVOT_IMAGE2_ALLOW_LOSSY). Default OFF preserves the merged 'WebP-only image2' behavior; flipping the flag opts AVIF/JXL matrices into the image2 staging path with multimap as the per-chunk safety net. Added 2 tests (test_image2_gated_off_for_avif_by_default, test_image2_enabled_for_avif_when_flag_on) pinning both states. 22/22 hardening tests pass.

title: Synchronize and Harden with I: drive changes
close_reason: Successfully merged and verified all hardening improvements from the I: drive across 5 phases. All tests passed.

title: T9: Delete vendor/python and vendor/bin/imagemagick (confirmed dupes)

close_reason: vendor/bin/imagemagick deleted (verified byte-identical to bin/magick, 8 files). vendor/python turned out to be a STALE PARTIAL snapshot (65 packages vs canonical 148) not a true dupe; left in place but excluded from the bundle assembler. Optional follow-up: delete vendor/python from working tree if no devs reference it.
